units.title: Occupational health and Safety in leather work environment

learning_outcomes.description: Apply Basic Knowledge of Occupational and Environmental Health and Safety in Leather Works

performance_criteria.description: Explain occupational health and safety
Identify health and safety risks in Leather work
Identify environmental hazard risks
Explain the effect of environmental hazards
Use environmental protection methods

learning_outcomes.description: Observe Personal Safety in the Work Environment

performance_criteria.description: Recognise safety rules in the workplace
Select personal protective equipment (PPEs)
Use appropriate personal protective equipment (PPEs) correctly
Use clean working surrounding/environment

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate Knowledge of First Aid Application

performance_criteria.description: Identify first aid materials
Select first aid materials
Use first aid methods
Demonstrate first aid procedures for defined situations
Wear clean, smart and Appropriate Personal Protective Equipment (PPEs)

Work safely at all times complying with health and safety and other relevant regulations and guidelines Get any cuts, grazes and Wounds given immediate treatment by the appropriate person(s) in the work environment.
Report illness and infections Promptly to the appropriate person(s).
State own responsibility under the Health and Safety Act as it relates to own occupation.
State general rules on hygiene that must be followed in the work environment.
State Personal Protective Equipment (PPEs) such as Head Protection, Foot Protection, Face and Eye Protection, Hand and Body Protection, etc.
State the importance of Maintaining good personal hygiene.
Describe how to deal with cuts, grazes and wounds by a First Aider.
Explain why it is important to deal with cuts, grazes and wounds promptly in the work environment.
State the importance of working in a healthy, safe and hygienic workplace.
Report any accident or near accidents quickly and Accurately to the proper person(s).
Follow health, hygienic and safety procedures in doing any work.
Practice emergency procedures during work.
Follow organizational security procedures in doing work.
Ensure the proper pollution Control of organic and inorganic waste are strictly followed
Follow sound and noise Control and protection Methods in the work environment.
State where information About health and safety procedures and regulations can be obtained in the work environment
Ensure that identified hazards or potential hazards are handled by appropriate personnel.
Identify any hazards or potential hazards
Describe types of hazards in the workplace that may occur
Describe how types of Hazards occur in the workplace can be dealt with
State the hazards that can be dealt with personally
State the hazards that should be reported to someone else for treatment and/ or seeking for external solution.

learning_outcomes.description: Work Safely in Hygienic and Secure Workplace

performance_criteria.description: State how to warn other People about hazards and why this is important.
State why accidents and near accidents should be reported And who they should be reported to.
Describe the types of emergencies that may happen in the workplace.
Describe how to deal with types of emergencies in the workplace.
State where to find the first- aid equipment in the work environment.
Identify who is a registered First-aider in the work place.
State safe lifting and handling techniques that should be followed in the work place.
State other ways of working safely relevant to own position in the work place and why they are important.

learning_outcomes.description: Demonstrate Understanding of Handling Fire Emergencies in the Workplace

performance_criteria.description: Describe the organizational emergency procedures, with particular reference to fire outbreak
Describe how own organizational emergency procedures should be followed e.g. in the event of fire outbreak.
State the possible causes of fire out-break in the work place.
Describe how to minimize the possibility of fire out-break in the workplace.
State where to find the alarms (e.g. fire alarms) and how to set them off.
State why a fire should never be approached unless it is safe.
State the importance of following the fire safety laws.
Describe organizational Security procedures for dangers e.g fire outbreak
State why organizational Security procedures for dangers e.g fire outbreak is important.
State the importance of Reporting all usual or Unusual (non-routine) incidents that will constitute dangers in the workplace to the appropriate personnel.

units.title: Communication System in Leather works environment

learning_outcomes.description: LOCATE SOURCES OF INFORMATION IN THE WORK ENVIRONMENT

performance_criteria.description: Identify sources of information in an organization.
Identify sources of information in own work environment.
Locate sources of information in own work environment.
Relate appropriately with the sources of information in own work environment.
Use various information flow systems in a work environment.
Use information available in own work environment to avoid challenges in a given work situation.
Report findings in work situations in accordance to information flow procedures in a given work environment.

learning_outcomes.description: USE NON- COMPLEX COMMUNICATION SYSTEM IN A WORK ENVIRONMENT

performance_criteria.description: Use simple verbal means to pass necessary information in the work environment.
Demonstrate simple non- verbal means to pass necessary information in the work environment e.g. body language (shaking/nodding of head) .
Use simple non-verbal means to pass necessary information in the work environment e.g. body language
Read symbols and sign correctly as a means of passing information in the work environment.
Interpret symbols and signs appropriately as a means of passing information in the work environment.
Sketch with labelling various symbols and signs appropriately as a means of passing information in the work environment.

learning_outcomes.description: APPLY KNOWLEDGE OF COMMUNICATION IN LEATHER WORKS ENVIRONMENT

performance_criteria.description: Explain the term communication in leather works.
Identify the types of communication available in the work environment.
Explain the importance of communication in the work environment.
State the ethics in communication in an organizational work environment.
State the ethics in communication in own work environment
Communicate a business message in own work environment.

learning_outcomes.description: USE COMMUNICATION MEANS IN THE WORK ENVIRONMENT

performance_criteria.description: Locate the various communication equipment in the work environment.
Use effectively the various communication equipment in the work environment e.g. telephone, radio message, etc.
Pass information effectively with chosen communication equipment to the right personnel.
Pass information effectively to the right personnel using symbols, signs and codes.
Obey laid down instructions and Regulations in line with ethics of The work environment.
Obey communicated instructions in line with ethics of the own work environment.

learning_outcomes.description: USE COMMUNICATION AS TOOL TO RELATE WITH CUSTOMER IN A WORK ENVIRONMENT

performance_criteria.description: Explain customer relation skills in the work environment.
Outline benefits of customer relations skills
Outline steps to get feedback from customers.

learning_outcomes.description: COMMUNICATE EFFECTIVELY IN A TEAM WORK

performance_criteria.description: Describe Team work in a work environment.
State the importance of Team work in a work environment.
Identify own role and responsibility within a team work.
Recognize requirement of own services in a team work.
Ensure that correct information is received of own responsibilities in a team work
Communicate effectively the outcome of own services in a team work.

learning_outcomes.description: DEVELOP POSITIVE WORKING RELATIONSHIP WITH COLLEAGUES IN THE WORK ENVIRONMENT

performance_criteria.description: Explain the need for developing positive working relationship with colleagues in the work environment.
Explain the importance of relating with other people in a way that makes them feel valued and respected.
Assist team members when one’s services are required.
Report to the authorized personnel when request is made for assistance falling outside one’s area of responsibility.
Communicate information to colleagues about own work that might affect performance of others.

learning_outcomes.description: TAKE RESPONSIBILITIES WITHIN THE TEAM

performance_criteria.description: Explain own role and responsibilities within the team for a group work.
Carry out individual tasks in a given group assignment in line with the team’s rules and regulations.
Participate effectively in a given team work.
Give own report of task carried out in a team whenever it is required.
Carry out own tasks in a team in line with organizational standards
Use organization code of practice for given job done in the team.
Assess organizational code of conduct for own and team jobs.
Explain organizational code of conduct for own and team jobs
Itemize rules that guide the activities of the team
Report activities of the team work that may affect organizational code of conduct to the higher authority.

performance_criteria.description: List various types of Leather

learning_outcomes.description: Works

performance_criteria.description: List basic working tools used in leather works

performance_criteria.description: State basic operation of leather sewing machine

performance_criteria.description: Sketch simple patterns for leather works using paper
Produce simple patterns of leather works using paper

learning_outcomes.description: Understand Electric sewing machines used for leather works

performance_criteria.description: Identify the different types of sewing machines used for leather works
Describe the components of electric sewing machines used for leather works
state the functions of the various components parts of a sewing machine used for leather works
Select consumable items used in sewing operation

learning_outcomes.description: Operate the components of electric sewing machines

performance_criteria.description: Control electric sewing machines effectively.
Set needles on the electric sewing machine for sewing process.
Position needles on the sewing machine.
Put thread on the bobbin (reeler) for sewing processes.
Fix the bobbin inside the bobbin case and onto the electric sewing machine.
Trace the thread from the appropriate positions to the needle in preparation for sewing.
Bring out the two threads from the up and down positions out of the hole of the plate in readiness for sewing process.
Select leather materials to be sewed on electric sewing machine
Select types of working tools to be fixed on the electric sewing machines for specified jobs.
Carry out straight sewing on various types of leather materials.
Sew leather products on electric sewing machines.

learning_outcomes.description: Operate Zig- Zag sewing machines used for Leather products (foot wears, bags, belts, wallets, etc).

performance_criteria.description: Identify the differences in physical components of straight sewing machine and Zig-zag sewing machines used for Leather products.

Identify consumable items used for machine stamping of leather products e.g. paints, thinner, cushion foam, water cleaner, e.t.c.

performance_criteria.description: Identify the different types of products to be stamped (manual or machine stamping).

Prepare various surfaces of leather products for stamping.
Select different types of logo to be stamped at various positions (areas) of leather products.

Fix the stamping brand onto the platform of the manual stamping
Fix the foil paper on the stamping face of the brand.
Position the leather material to be stamped at convenient working surface for the stamping process. foam onto the leather products prior to the application of the stamp.

Set up the stamping machine with a platform to carry the given job.
Fix the stamping brand onto the platform of the stamping machines.
